<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for expectations (run ruff + pytest; Docker is needed for tests).
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Use a closing keyword so the issue auto-closes on merge, e.g. "Closes #123". -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (Docker running for testcontainers)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Rebuilt Tailwind CSS if templates/CSS/JS changed (`static/css/output.css` committed)
- [ ] Added an Alembic migration if the DB schema changed
- [ ] Updated docs (README / CLAUDE.md / PLAN.md) as needed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, screenshots for UI changes, etc. -->
